title: google/agents-cli
friendlyTitle: Google's agents-cli helps build cloud AI agents
summary: Google's agents-cli provides a command-line toolkit and skills intended to help coding assistants create, evaluate, and deploy AI agents on Google Cloud.
friendlySummary: This repo gives developers command-line tools for making and testing AI agents on Google Cloud.
whyItMatters: Developers experimenting with agent deployment can use it as a practical scaffold for cloud agent workflows, evaluation loops, and repeatable assistant skills.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help builders move from agent demos toward deployable systems.
